content_body: What a wonderful cabin!!! We loved your other cabin at Lake Blue Ridge (Majestic Lake) in February, and this one is even more beautiful. What a view! This was our after-tax season recovery weekend. Usually we spend it in Buckhead, but after our stay in February, we decided the mountains were for us. I can't tell you how nice it is to stay somewhere so quiet and beautiful. The weather was perfect. The whole cabin is comfortable and homey. Thanks for all the extras that you guys put into this place to make it so nice. We will be back!!! Going home right now to check our calendar and the website!
title: Post Tax Season Recovery Weekend in Blue Ridge, GA
